description: Under the proposed system, tankers would be required to share cargo details via email before being assigned a transit fee, reportedly set at $1 per barrel. title: BCCI introduces stricter IPL rule, curbs extra players’ movement on field
description: BCCI has introduced new IPL 2026 rules restricting substitute players’ movement. Only the 16 named players can enter the field, while others must stay in the dugout. A maximum of five substitutes can be near the boundary. The move tightens existing rules to reduce on-field crowding and improve discipline, though no official reason has been provided.

The two were spotted relaxing together and sharing a hug which has convinced fans that they are having an alleged affair. Though both Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini have denied such rumors, an alleged old affair of hers has resurfaced.

title: Success quote of the day: Greatest success comes from freedom to fail
description: Mark Zuckerberg champions a philosophy where success stems from the freedom to fail, not from perfection. He argues that taking risks and learning from mistakes, even after setbacks like botched acquisitions, is crucial for innovation. This 'freedom to fail' encourages trying new ideas, as demonstrated by figures like J.K. Rowling and Beyoncé, ultimately paving the way for significant achievements.

Critics say the situation is being overstated, arguing that logistical issues are being framed as a larger diplomatic sacrifice.

He revealed intentions for both sanctions relief and potential tariffs on countries that supply weaponry to Iran. This interim measure is designed to create room for expansive talks on nuclear limitations and regional stability.

description: Former Australia cricketer David Warner has been charged with drink driving in Sydney after allegedly recording a blood alcohol level of 0.104 during a random test. He will appear in court on May 7. Cricket NSW called the matter serious but pledged support. The incident may impact his reputation, though it is unlikely to affect his ongoing Pakistan Super League participation.

title: Kerala startups are a Left success story, but can they overcome the scaling hurdle?
Anthropic CEO says AI will take your job;but his own company find enough people to work
description: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei is warning that AI could eliminate more than 50% of entry-level white-collar jobs within five years. But inside his own company, the picture looks different. Claude Code creator Boris Cherny says the software engineer job title is already dying — and Anthropic's Head of Growth says they can't hire enough PMs to keep up. The disruption isn't coming. It's already here.

description: Netflix’s "Untold: Chess Mates" revisits the 2022 controversy between Magnus Carlsen and Hans Niemann, sparked by Carlsen’s withdrawal after a shock defeat and the subsequent cheating allegations. The film examines Niemann’s lawsuit, claims of reputational harm, and tensions involving Chess.com’s business ties. Despite polished storytelling, it offers no new evidence, leaving both players standing by their positions.

description: A ceasefire has been declared between the United States and Iran after 38 days of war. US President Donald Trump agreed to halt military actions for two weeks. This development followed threats from Trump to destroy Iran's civilization if the Strait of Hormuz was not reopened. Both nations are claiming victory.

title: From obliterate to ceasefire: How Trump's Iran war strategy shifted hour by hour
description: A 39-day US-Israel war with Iran has entered a two-week ceasefire after escalating rapidly, causing thousands of deaths and widespread displacement. The conflict, initiated by coordinated strikes on Iranian leadership, expanded to disrupt global energy markets and shipping routes. President Trump's objectives and timelines shifted throughout the war, culminating in a fragile pause.

title: Yashasvi Jaiswal scripts history as RR star breaks multiple IPL records
description: Yashasvi Jaiswal's explosive 77 powered Rajasthan Royals to a 27-run victory over Mumbai Indians in a rain-shortened IPL 2026 clash. Jaiswal's innings, featuring 10 boundaries and four sixes, propelled RR to the top of the table. His century of sixes in the IPL is a remarkable feat, underscoring his destructive batting prowess and consistent performance for the franchise.

Experts debate whether this is a strategic pause or a calculated application of the 'Madman Theory' to force negotiations.

This intervention aims to dismantle unfair trade practices and restore trust in everyday transactions.

description: Aditya Dhar’s espionage epic, 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge,' continues to script history at the global box office. On day 21, Wednesday, April 8, 2026, the Ranveer Singh-led thriller solidified its legendary status by becoming the first Hindi film ever to surpass the Rs. 1,000 crore India net milestone. Having already outpaced giants like 'Jawan' and 'KGF: Chapter 2', the film has now amassed a domestic net of Rs. 1,034.00 crore. Despite the ongoing IPL 2026 season, the film remains a powerhouse, eyeing a Rs. 1,700 crore worldwide gross target.

title: Megan Thee Stallion recalls emotional moment amid Klay Thompson romance
description: The Dallas Mavericks’ star player, Klay Thompson, has proven his love and loyalty towards the popular Grammy winner, Megan Thee Stallion, for close to a year of their high profile romance. While Megan Thee Stallion and Klay Thompson seem happy together, the popular artist had gone through a lot in her life, including witnessing her mother’s brutal death in 2019.

title: Serena Williams shares rare Easter pics, opens up on motherhood journey
description: Serena Williams shared rare Easter photos with Alexis Ohanian and daughters Olympia and Adira, calling family time everything. She also spoke on Today about motherhood, her daughters’ personalities, and learning to balance attention between them. Her words and photos showed a simple, honest side of life after tennis, focused fully on family and everyday moments.
